title: Galactic Postal Servitude
description:
Galactic Postal Servitude is a single-player, point-and-click deduction game set in a chaotic alien post office.

As the newest employee, you're tasked with inspecting and approving or denying packages bound for strange worlds with stranger rules.

Scan for clues, consult your trusty database, and try to keep up as regulations shift with each passing day. Accuracy matters. Time is tight. Mistakes are... noted.

Winner of DARE Academy 2025 and DARE Academy 2025 Audience Choice Award.

news.title: Abertay University announces student finalists for DARE Academy 2025
